mnemonics: BICEC - Brute Force, Improve, Code, Execute, Compare - the core problem-solving steps
keyPoints: Algorithms are step-by-step procedures for solving problems
Algorithm analysis focuses on time and space complexity
Asymptotic notation (Big O) describes algorithm efficiency
commonMistakes: Confusing worst-case (Big O) with average-case complexity
Focusing only on time complexity while ignoring space complexity
Using inappropriate data structures for the algorithm type
